title: adolia buxifolia
intro: Adolia buxifolia, also known as the Yellow Myrtle, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and combat infections. The health benefits of Adolia buxifolia include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
